arts.ttl: Barcelona squad receive golden gifts from teammate before Spanish Super Cup success
arts.sum: Last weekend was raucous for Barcelona, as they thumped Real Madrid 5-2 to win the Spanish Super Cup. Celebrations were hefty, and for Hansi Flick’s squad, it was made slightly more special by Raphinha. As per Relevo, the Brazilian attacker gifted his teammates a gold watch before the final against Real Madrid, and given that […] The post Barcelona squad receive golden gifts from teammate before Spanish Super Cup success appeared first on Football España.
